item.title: 独家：知情人士称软银旗下PayPay定价低于预期区间，每股16美元
item.description: 知情人士称，软银集团旗下的PayPay周三将其美国首次公开募股定价为每股16美元，低于目标价格区间。美以两国对伊朗的战争给市场带来压力。【原文：SoftBank Group-backed PayPay priced its U.S. initial public offering at $16 per share on Wednesday, below its targeted price range, people familiar with the matter said, as the ​U.S.-Israeli war on Iran weighed on markets.】

item.title: 文件显示，甲骨文在TikTok美国合资企业中的股权价值约为20亿美元。
item.description: 周三提交的文件显示，甲骨文在TikTok美国业务中的股权价值约为20亿美元。此前一个多月，TikTok中国母公司字节跳动已敲定协议，将成立一家由其控股的美国合资企业以规避禁令。【原文：Oracle's stake in TikTok's U.S. business operations is worth around $2 billion, a filing showed on Wednesday, ​more than a month after its Chinese ‌parent ByteDance finalized a deal to set up a majority-owned American joint venture to avoid a ban.】

item.title: 好市多顾客起诉要求分摊特朗普关税的退款
item.description: 好市多批发公司周三被提起一项拟议的全国性集体诉讼，要求该公司向美国消费者退还此前收取的溢价。此前美国最高法院已推翻了特朗普总统实施的进口关税。【原文：Costco Wholesale was sued on Wednesday in a proposed nationwide class action seeking U.S. customer refunds for ​higher prices charged by the company before the U.S. Supreme Court ‌struck down import tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump.】

item.title: Atlassian将裁员约1600人，转向人工智能领域
item.description: 软件供应商Atlassian周三宣布，将裁减约10%的员工，即约1600个岗位，作为推进人工智能和企业销售业务重组计划的一部分。【原文：Software provider Atlassian said on Wednesday ​it would lay off ‌around 10% of its workforce, or roughly 1,600 positions, as part ​of a restructuring ​plan to push into ⁠artificial intelligence and enterprise ​sales.】

item.title: 交易日：油价与收益率一路飙升
item.description: 周三油价大幅攀升，尽管全球原油储备创纪录地释放，这加剧了通胀担忧，并推动两年期国债收益率升至9月以来最高水平。股市承受的压力过大，华尔街多数股指收跌。【原文：Oil prices rose sharply on Wednesday despite a record release of global crude reserves, stoking inflation fears and lifting two-year Treasury yields to the highest since September. The weight on stocks was too much, and Wall Street ended mostly lower.】

item.title: 五角大楼为"经济防御部门"招揽高盛、摩根大通银行家，据Semafor报道
item.description: 据Semafor周三报道，五角大楼正组建一支精通私募股权的新投资银行团队，计划在三年内向国防交易投入2000亿美元。该报道援引了其查阅的一份文件。【原文：The Pentagon is building a new team of investment bankers steeped in private equity to ​invest $200 billion over three years in defense deals, Semafor ‌reported on Wednesday, citing a document it had reviewed.】

item.title: 人类学五边形组织在人工智能安全保障问题上的争端如何升级
item.description: 今年1月，美国国防部与Anthropic公司爆发对峙，起因是这家人工智能实验室拒绝放松其系统安全防护措施，导致五角大楼将其列为"供应链风险"，使该公司的政府合同面临风险。【原文：A standoff erupted between the U.S. Department of Defense and Anthropic in January after the AI lab refused to loosen safety guardrails on its systems, prompting the Pentagon to label it a 'supply-chain risk,' and putting the company's government contracts in jeopardy.】

item.title: Bumble季度营收超出预期
item.description: Bumble周三公布的第四季度营收超出预期，这家约会应用运营商开始从全面转型计划中获得初步成效，其股价在盘后交易中上涨约12%。【原文：Bumble on Wednesday posted ​fourth-quarter revenue above estimates, ‌as the dating app operator began to see early benefits ​from a broad turnaround ​plan, sending its shares up about ⁠12% in extended trading.】

item.title: 亿万富翁卡齐马蒂迪斯表示，加油站的痛苦将在一两个月内缓解
item.description: 宾夕法尼亚州一家炼油厂和纽约多家连锁超市的亿万富翁老板约翰·卡茨马蒂迪斯周二接受路透社采访时表示，消费者将在一两个月内从加油站快速上涨的油价中获得缓解。【原文：Consumers will get relief from the rapid ​increases in fuel prices at the pumps in a month or ‌two, John Catsimatidis, the billionaire owner of a Pennsylvania refinery and New York supermarket chains, told Reuters in an interview on Tuesday.】

item.title: 葡萄牙警告外国国家支持的黑客正瞄准官员和军方通讯账户
item.description: 英国国家安全局（SIS）周三警告称，外国政府支持的黑客已发起全球网络攻击行动，试图入侵政府官员、外交官和军事人员的WhatsApp及Signal通讯账户。【原文：Foreign state-backed hackers have launched a global cyber campaign to access the ​WhatsApp and Signal accounts of government officials, ‌diplomats and military personnel, the national intelligence service (SIS) warned on Wednesday.】

item.title: 据《华尔街日报》报道，蒂尔曼·费尔蒂塔正洽谈以70亿美元收购凯撒娱乐公司。
item.description: 据《华尔街日报》周三援引知情人士报道，亿万富翁蒂尔曼·费尔蒂塔以约70亿美元的价格收购凯撒娱乐公司进入独家谈判阶段，此前他提出的报价超越了亿万富翁投资者卡尔·伊坎旗下公司的竞购方案。【原文：Billionaire Tilman Fertitta has been in exclusive ​talks to buy Caesars Entertainment ​for roughly $7 billion after he ⁠topped a competing offer ​from billionaire investor Carl Icahn's firm, ​the Wall Street Journal reported on Wednesday, citing people familiar with the ​matter.】

item.title: 据彭博社报道，特朗普将援引紧急状态法支持加州石油生产商Sable
item.description: 据彭博社周三报道，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普计划援引紧急状态法，以支持萨博尔海上公司重启加州一组海上平台的石油生产。该报道援引知情人士消息称。【原文：U.S. President Donald Trump plans to invoke emergency law for ​Sable Offshore as it looks to restart ‌production from a cluster of offshore platforms in California, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday, citing a person ​familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 西班牙移动通信基站运营商Cellnex预计行业整合步伐将放缓
item.description: 欧洲最大移动通信基站运营商Cellnex的首席执行官表示，中东冲突引发的市场动荡意味着该行业的整合进程将不会如他此前预期般迅速推进。【原文：The chief executive of Cellnex , Europe's largest mobile phone tower operator, said volatile markets in the ‌wake of the Middle East conflict meant consolidation in the sector would not happen as quickly as he had previously expected.】

item.title: 马士基重新分配船舶燃料以确保供应，伊朗战争导致供应中断
item.description: 马士基航运集团周三表示，正重新分配燃油以确保船队供应，因伊朗战争导致中东地区海运燃油的流通与储存受到干扰。【原文：Container shipping group ‌Maersk said on Wednesday it is redistributing fuel to ensure supplies for its vessels as the Iran war disrupts the flow and storage of maritime fuel in the Middle East.】

item.title: Rivian旗下分拆公司Mind Robotics在A轮融资中估值达20亿美元
item.description: 由电动汽车制造商Rivian分拆出来的初创公司Mind Robotics周三宣布，已完成由Accel和Andreessen Horowitz联合领投的5亿美元A轮融资。【原文：Mind Robotics, a startup spun out ‌of EV maker Rivian , said on Wednesday it has raised $500 million in a Series A funding co-led by Accel and Andreessen Horowitz.】

item.title: 美国2月预算赤字维持在3080亿美元不变，因关税收入尚未受到法院裁决影响
item.description: 美国2月份预算赤字为3080亿美元，与去年同期基本持平，主要原因是财政收入与支出增幅基本相当。其中，特朗普总统关税政策带来的财政收入尚未反映上月美国最高法院对其多项关税措施的裁决结果。【原文：The U.S. budget deficit for February was nearly flat with a year earlier at $308 billion as growth in ​receipts and outlays were largely even, with receipts from ‌President Donald Trump's tariffs not yet reflecting the U.S. Supreme Court's ruling against many of his duties last month.】

item.title: 丘博将担任美国主要保险商，为伊朗战争期间的墨西哥湾航运提供保障
item.description: 美国国际开发金融公司周三宣布，保险巨头丘博公司将成为其200亿美元海运再保险计划的主要合作伙伴，该计划旨在恢复海湾地区的商业航运。【原文：Insurance giant Chubb will be the lead partner on the U.S. International Development Finance Corporation's $20 billion Maritime Reinsurance Plan aimed at resuming ​commercial shipping in the Gulf, the agency said on Wednesday.】

item.title: 据《华尔街日报》报道，Papa John's正重新审议Irth Capital提出的15亿美元私有化收购要约。
item.description: 据《华尔街日报》周三报道，知情人士透露，Papa John's International正审议Irth Capital Management提出的最新收购要约，该私募基金拟以约15亿美元估值将这家美国披萨连锁企业私有化。【原文：Papa John's International is reviewing a fresh bid from Irth Capital Management to take the U.S. pizza chain private, valuing it ​at about $1.5 billion, the Wall Street Journal reported on Wednesday, citing ‌people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 加拿大寻求增加石油产量以遏制伊朗战争引发的油价飙升
item.description: 加拿大自然资源部长蒂姆·霍奇森周三表示，该国将寻求增加原油产量，以助力全球稳定油价的努力，应对伊朗战争带来的挑战。【原文：Canada will look at ways to increase its crude production to ​help global efforts to stabilize oil ‌prices in the face of the Iran war, Natural Resources Minister Tim Hodgson said Wednesday.】

item.title: 随着伊朗战争持续升级，美国汽油价格在加油站突破每加仑3.50美元大关。
item.description: 美国汽车协会(AAA)和GasBuddy的数据显示，本周美国汽油全国平均零售价突破每加仑3.50美元，创2024年5月以来新高。以色列与美国对伊朗的战争加剧了市场对供应的担忧。【原文：The national average retail price of gasoline crossed $3.50 a gallon this week to hit its highest since May 2024, data from ​price tracking services AAA and GasBuddy showed, as the Israel-U.S. war with ‌Iran stokes supply concerns.】

item.title: FCC主席批评亚马逊卫星发射进度缓慢
item.description: 联邦通信委员会主席驳回了亚马逊公司对埃隆·马斯克旗下SpaceX公司计划发射多达100万颗卫星的批评。【原文：The chairman of the Federal Communications ​Commission dismissed criticism ‌from Amazon.com of Elon Musk's SpaceX plan to launch a ​constellation of up ​to 1 million satellites.】

item.title: 据《华尔街日报》报道，麦当劳将于4月起在美国推出3美元超值套餐
item.description: 据《华尔街日报》周三报道，麦当劳将于4月在美国推出定价3美元或以下的菜单品项，以及4美元的早餐套餐，这家汉堡连锁企业正试图吸引因经济困境而疲于应付的顾客。【原文：McDonald's will introduce menu items priced at $3 or less, along with $4 breakfast meal deals in ​the U.S., starting in April, the Wall Street ‌Journal reported on Wednesday, as the burger chain looks to attract diners worn down by economic woes.】

item.title: MercadoLibre今年将在阿根廷投资34亿美元
item.description: 电子商务公司MercadoLibre首席执行官阿里埃尔·萨尔夫斯泰因周三表示，该公司预计今年将在阿根廷投资34亿美元。【原文：E-commerce ‌firm MercadoLibre expects to invest $3.4 billion in Argentina this year, Chief Executive Officer Ariel Szarfsztejn said on Wednesday.】

item.title: Enverus称，2025年全球油气上游领域并购活动较为低迷
item.description: 分析公司Enverus周三表示，2025年国际上游油气市场的交易活动连续第二年保持低迷，总交易额仅为180亿美元。【原文：Dealmaking in the international upstream oil and gas market remained subdued for the second straight year in 2025, totaling just $18 billion, ​analytics firm Enverus said on Wednesday.】

item.title: 特斯拉交付量下滑可能延续至第三年，部分人士担忧，因现金消耗迫在眉睫
item.description: 特斯拉投资者和分析师正下调其电动汽车交付量预期，部分人士甚至预测交付量将连续第三年下滑。随着首席执行官埃隆·马斯克将重心转向推出自动驾驶出租车和人形机器人的高成本目标，公司利润正面临压力。【原文：Tesla investors and analysts are cutting estimates for its electric vehicle deliveries and some are now expecting a third straight year of decline, pressuring profit as CEO Elon ​Musk refocuses on the expensive goals of launching robotaxis and humanoid robots.】

item.title: 马斯克揭晓特斯拉与xAI联合项目"宏大硬件"，瞄准软件颠覆
item.description: 埃隆·马斯克周三公布了特斯拉与他的人工智能初创公司xAI的联合项目，该项目被命名为"宏大智能"或"数字擎天柱"，他表示该系统能够模拟软件公司的功能。【原文：Elon Musk on Wednesday unveiled a joint project between Tesla and his artificial intelligence startup xAI, which he called "Macrohard" or "Digital ​Optimus" and said that it was a system capable ‌of emulating the functions of software companies.】

item.title: Gen Digital在哥伦比亚大学诉讼案中推翻4.81亿美元专利赔偿裁决
item.description: 美国上诉法院周三推翻了一项4.81亿美元的判决，此前纽约哥伦比亚大学因软件公司Gen Digital侵犯网络安全技术相关专利而胜诉。【原文：A U.S. appeals court on Wednesday overturned a $481 million ruling that New York's Columbia University had won against ​software company Gen Digital for infringing patents related to ‌cybersecurity technology.】

item.title: 英国石油公司和雪佛龙公司在墨西哥湾小型油气拍卖中斥资最多
item.description: 周三，墨西哥湾钻探权拍卖以4698万美元的高价成交，多家石油天然气公司参与竞标。据美国政府直播拍卖会显示，其中英国石油公司（BP）单次出价就占总成交额近半数。【原文：A sale of drilling ‌rights in the Gulf of Mexico on Wednesday ended with $46.98 million in high bids from oil and gas companies, ​with a single bid from BP accounting ​for nearly half of the total, according to ⁠a livestreamed U.S. government auction.】

item.title: 新思科技推出用于设计人工智能芯片的新软件工具
item.description: 新思科技周三推出了一系列新型软件工具，用于应对人工智能芯片设计日益增长的复杂性。这是该公司斥资350亿美元收购工程软件公司安世半导体后推出的首批新产品。【原文：Synopsys on Wednesday rolled out new software tools to handle the fast-increasing complexity of designing ​artificial intelligence chips, the first wave of new offerings after ‌its $35 billion buyout of engineering software firm Ansys.】

item.title: CVS旗下安泰保险支付1.177亿美元，就其欺诈联邦医疗保险的指控达成和解
item.description: CVS Health旗下子公司Aetna同意支付1.177亿美元，以解决美国政府对其欺诈医疗保险的指控。该公司被控在医疗保险优势计划参保人中，故意提交病态肥胖及其他健康状况的不准确诊断代码。【原文：Aetna, a unit of CVS Health , agreed to pay $117.7 million to resolve U.S. government charges it defrauded Medicare by knowingly submitting inaccurate diagnosis codes for morbid obesity and other health conditions in ​Medicare Advantage Plan enrollees.】
